threshold_event: Finland/Yle row gains one quick official corroboration surface and moves from broadcaster-only comparator toward mixed-authority comparator.
minimum_evidence_needed: One public Finnish police, court, or ministry source that directly confirms the observed AI-assisted administrative-appeals phenomenon or institutional response named in the Yle row.
paper_readiness_delta_if_event_lands: Would strengthen the Finland row from bounded broadcaster-only support toward mixed-authority comparator status, improve Table 1D/Figure 6 prose, and reduce dependence on one-country official visibility without changing the need for translation caution.
still_not_safe_after_patch: Does not justify prevalence claims, adjudicated wrongdoing, system-wide legal-process contamination, or default substantive equality with the Slovenian direct-official row.

next_smallest_publishability_move: Only open this route when one exact official corroboration target is available; otherwise keep exploiting the current bounded broadcaster row.
